Metadata.SourceFile: Monty on the Run (Zzap Sizzlers II Collection - Kixx).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x32F4 "MONTYONTHERUN-32F4" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Monty on the Run.prg"
